name: Public Goods Staking Protocol
summary: Dev Guild workstream using validator infrastructure and vault routing to create recurring public-goods funding.
description: The Public Goods Staking Protocol is a Greenpill Dev Guild workstream sourced from the Dev Guild Paragraph series. Public sources describe a path where validator infrastructure, Dappnode, Obol distributed validator technology, Lido CSM, and Octant-aligned vault routing can help communities generate recurring funding for public goods. Treat Squad Staking as part of this workstream, not a separate project seed in this batch.

seo.title: Public Goods Staking Protocol · Greenpill Network
seo.description: The Public Goods Staking Protocol is a Dev Guild workstream for recurring public-goods funding through validator infrastructure and vault routing.
